title: Face Mesh Tracker
author: @nikos
description: A high-performance pipeline for real-time 478-point face mesh estimation using MediaPipe. Ideal for AR and facial expression analysis.

title: Advanced Image Levels
author: @nikos
description: A professional-grade node for fine-tuning image intensity. Control black/white points, midtone gamma, and output range to perfect your dataset's dynamic range.

title: Optical Granulometry
author: @nikos
description: Complete pipeline for quantitative particle analysis using Watershed segmentation. Features automatic counting, average area measurement, and size distribution analysis.

title: De-shadowing node
author: @nikos
description: An essential node for recovering details from deep shadows and protecting overexposed highlights. Perfect for surveillance, outdoor robotics, and low-light photography.

title: Histogram Analysis
author: @nikos
description: Perform radiometric analysis of image data. This node visualizes the statistical distribution of pixel intensities across spectral channels, providing key metrics like mean and standard deviation for scientific validation.

title: Unit Calibration
author: @nikos
description: Convert pixel measurements into physical units (mm, cm, m). Supports both length and area scaling, essential for precise scientific metrology and particle sizing.

title: FFT Spectrum Analysis
author: @nikos
description: Visualize the frequency content of an image using the Fast Fourier Transform. Analyze periodic patterns, noise, and texture characteristics in the frequency domain.

title: Inverse FFT (IFFT)
author: @nikos
description: The counterpart to the FFT node. Reconstructs an image from a frequency spectrum. Combined with the FFT node and image painting tools, it allows for manual frequency-domain filtering.

title: Spectral Gain (EQ)
author: @nikos
description: A 3-band spatial frequency equalizer. Boost or cut low, mid, and high frequencies on raw spectral magnitude data. Perfect for texture enhancement or noise reduction.
